message:
chore: close 21 effectively-complete beads across scripting, config, and dataflow

Scripting engine (wa-3dfxb chain, 13 closures):
- wa-3dfxb.1: ScriptingEngine trait + dispatcher (769 LOC)
- wa-3dfxb.2: LuaEngine impl (385 LOC, 6 tests)
- wa-3dfxb.3: Wasmtime + WASI integration (630 LOC, 17 tests)
- wa-3dfxb.4: WasmEngine impl (same as .3, trait satisfied)
- wa-3dfxb.5: WASM sandbox security (445 LOC, 18+6 tests)
- wa-3dfxb.6: Config format auto-detection (428 LOC)
- wa-3dfxb.7: wezterm.lua migration tool (467 LOC)
- wa-3dfxb.8: .ftx extension package format (494 LOC, 11 tests)
- wa-3dfxb.9: Extension API (keybindings/events/storage, 1641 LOC)
- wa-3dfxb.10: Extension lifecycle management (872 LOC)
- wa-3dfxb.11: Dual-engine integration tests (11KB)
- wa-3dfxb.13: Native event hooks (607 LOC, 24 tests)
- wa-3k2g1: luahelper optional behind feature flag

Config and infrastructure (4 closures):
- wa-2t4oa: TOML + WASM config evaluation (1001 LOC)
- wa-2ufom: Lua optional in mux crate (feature-gated)
- wa-2h1ha.1: Tokio leaks removed from search_bridge
- wa-283h4.5: Reactive dataflow graph (2284 LOC)

Finish-line beads (4 closures):
- ft-akx00.5.3: FTUI views all live state-backed
- ft-akx00.5.4: PaneCapabilities fully implemented
- ft-xbnl0.3.1: Machine-control uses real state
- ft-xbnl0.3.2: Scrollback/FTUI read real data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
